name: Aphelios, Exalted
text: When you attach an Equipment to me, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn —Ready 2 runes.Channel 1 rune exhausted.Buff a friendly unit.
text_rich:
When you attach an Equipment to me, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn —

  • Ready 2 runes.
  • Channel 1 rune exhausted.
  • Buff a friendly unit.
accessibility_text:
Riftbound Unit: Aphelios, Exalted. When you attach an Equipment to me, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn —
- Ready 2 runes.
- Channel 1 rune exhausted.
- Buff a friendly unit.
